paper_title: On the Decision to Act: Scale Independence and Empirical Validation

phase_ready.note: Retroactive AI layer. Paper published but pending v11 — P5 contains AMOC data and Ibn Khaldun comparison. Full independent validation requires P11 derivation of ω from first principles. This is the transitional paper between Act One and Act Three.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:A]
claim_registry.name: Scale independence principle
claim_registry.statement: If the FRM derives from topology and information content (P1 A-1.5), it must hold at any scale where the conditions are satisfied. Scale independence is not an additional assumption — it is a consequence of substrate independence.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:D]
claim_registry.name: AMOC parameter extraction
claim_registry.statement: Parameters λ, ω, A, B extracted from Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC) data by fitting the FRM functional form f(t) = B + A·e^(−λt)·cos(ωt + φ) to ocean circulation measurements.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:D]
claim_registry.name: Ibn Khaldun ω measurement
claim_registry.statement: Ibn Khaldun's three-generation estimate of the asabiyyah (social cohesion) cycle (1377 AD) constitutes an independent empirical measurement of the characteristic frequency ω at civilizational scale. This measurement was made without knowledge of the FRM.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: FRM fit to AMOC data
claim_registry.statement: The FRM functional form fits AMOC ocean circulation data with R² ≥ 0.85, and extracted parameters are physically meaningful (λ > 0, ω > 0).

WHERE.R2_frm_AMOC: scalar · dimensionless · R² of FRM fit to AMOC time series

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Fit FRM to AMOC data; extract parameters; verify R² ≥ 0.85 and parameters physically meaningful; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: R² = 0.85 → NOT FALSIFIED (boundary inclusive). λ = 0 or ω = 0 → FALSIFIED (degenerate FRM)
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: First empirical application at ocean-circulation scale. This is an application paper — failure here does not falsify the law, only this instantiation.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: ω agreement across scales
claim_registry.statement: The characteristic frequency ω extracted from AMOC data and the ω implied by Ibn Khaldun's three-generation estimate are consistent: |ω_AMOC − ω_Khaldun| / ω_AMOC < 0.3.

WHERE.ω_AMOC: scalar · yr⁻¹ · characteristic frequency from AMOC fit
WHERE.ω_Khaldun: scalar · yr⁻¹ · π/(2·τ_gen) where τ_gen = one generation ≈ 25–30 yr

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Extract ω_AMOC from fit; compute ω_Khaldun from generational estimate; compute fractional difference; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: 30% threshold is generous — accounts for uncertainty in generational timescale (25–30 yr range). If P11 derives ω independently and matches both, threshold tightens to 10%.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: [PLACEHOLDER: full independent validation requires P11 derivation of ω from first principles. Current comparison is preliminary.]

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: Scale independence demonstration
claim_registry.statement: The same functional form (FRM) fits both AMOC ocean circulation data and civilizational-scale data (Ibn Khaldun cycle) without substrate-specific modifications. This is the first empirical demonstration of scale independence.

WHERE.R2_frm_AMOC: scalar · dimensionless · R² of standard (unmodified) FRM fit
WHERE.FRM_modification_required: boolean · TRUE if achieving R² ≥ 0.85 requires adding scale-dependent terms to the FRM

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Fit standard FRM (no scale-dependent terms) to AMOC data; if R² < 0.85, attempt modified form; if only modified form achieves threshold → scale independence falsified; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Any modification that introduces scale-dependent parameters → FALSIFIED. Initial conditions (B, A, φ) are not scale-dependent parameters — they are measured per instance.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: [PLACEHOLDER: pending complete AMOC parameter extraction in P5 v11 revision]

placeholder_register.description: ω cross-scale agreement. Preliminary comparison available; full validation requires P11.
placeholder_register.target_session: OPEN — resolves with P11 derivation of ω from first principles

placeholder_register.description: Scale independence demonstration. Pending P5 v11 revision with complete AMOC parameter extraction.
